title: Bridge Essay: The Somatosensory Mismatch Negativity.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent-arising** (Phase 6) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Dependent-arising to mechanistic neuroscience.

**The Somatosensory Mismatch Negativity.** — Eur J Neurosci. PMID: 41288333. DOI: 10.1111/ejn.70301. Mismatch negativity (MMN) is awell-established neural signature of automatic change detection in the auditory modality. Growing evidence suggests that analogous responses exist in other sensory domains, including somatosensation. This review provides an initial overview of the somatosensory MMN (sMMN), summarizing findings from both human and animal research concerning its underlying neural mechanisms and functional significance as apredictive error signal.
